title: Butterflies close freeway lane
original_title: Unseasonal mass butterfly migration closes freeway lane
sentences: Many purple butterflies fly in Taiwan every year.
They usually fly in March or April.
This year, they fly in July.
More than six hundred butterflies fly every minute.
The road is closed to protect the butterflies.
This is the first time in twenty years.

title: Express train stops at small station
original_title: Express trains stop at Tainan's Longtian Station for first time
sentences: A train station is one hundred years old.
Only small trains stop there.
Now, fast trains also stop there.
People are very happy.
The trip is faster now.
Two fast trains stop every day.

title: Vendor turns off gas quickly
original_title: Vendor quickly turns off gas when sign crashes into stall
sentences: A woman sells food in Kaohsiung.
A strong wind blows a sign into her shop.
She turns off the gas very fast.
She learns this from the news.
People say she is very smart.
Her fast reaction stops a fire.

title: Food delivery costs more
original_title: Food delivery could get pricier with new law protecting workers' rights
sentences: Ordering food on the phone is popular.
A new law starts on July twenty first.
Uber Eats raises the price.
Foodpanda also raises the price.
Some people are not happy.
The law protects food delivery workers.

title: New cabin scooter on the road
original_title: Licensed 'cabin scooter' drivers allowed on road, banned from highways
sentences: A new scooter has a roof and doors.
It has three wheels.
You need a car license to drive it.
It is not allowed on the highway.
It costs more than three hundred thousand.
It is very quiet because it is electric.

title: Rat falls from ceiling in restaurant
original_title: Rat falls from ceiling at popular BBQ restaurant at Taipei Main
sentences: A restaurant is in Taipei Main Station.
People are eating dinner.
A rat falls from the ceiling.
People are very scared.
The restaurant says sorry.
They give discount coupons to customers.

title: Truck driver is safe after rockslide
original_title: Truck driver walks away mostly unscathed after Miaoli rockslide
sentences: It rains a lot in Taiwan.
Rocks fall from the mountain.
A truck is stuck under the rocks.
The driver is very scared.
He kicks the door open.
He runs away and is safe.

title: Traditional market becomes nightclub
original_title: Traditional market becomes nightclub in Taitung Expo attraction
sentences: A market sells vegetables and fish during the day.
At night, it becomes a nightclub.
There are neon lights and music.
People take many photos.
The Taitung Expo is very fun.
Old places have new life.

title: Dumpling shop raises price by three dollars
original_title: Dumpling shop praised for apologizing before minor price hike
sentences: A dumpling shop is in Taichung.
Dumplings cost fifteen dollars.
Now they cost eighteen dollars.
The owner says sorry to customers.
Customers understand and still buy.
The dumplings are very delicious.

title: Hotel brings Tainan food to Taipei
original_title: Five-star hotel offers local Tainan favorites targeting summer travelers
sentences: Tainan has very good food.
A hotel in Taipei brings Tainan food.
People can eat eel noodles.
People can eat rice cakes.
Many people come to eat.
The stock market is good, so people spend more.
